description:
Gate on epic bl-a847. Keeps the 100%-coverage rule from pre-commit hooks honest across the overhaul.

Required coverage:
- display.rs module: every branch of status_glyph, prio_dot, tree_prefix, use_color, use_unicode, badge functions.
- TTY detection: NO_COLOR set, CLICOLOR=0 set, --plain passed, piped-to-file (via assert_cmd's Command::assert stdout capture, which disables isatty).
- ASCII fallback: golden tests comparing Unicode and ASCII output for each command.
- bl dep tree: tree drawing correctness (depth, is_last, ancestors trail), cycle detection, multi-root handling.
- Epic progress bar: bounds (0/0, 10/10, partial), ASCII vs Unicode fallback, json schema.
- Column truncation: narrow terminal (COLUMNS=40) trims tags then title correctly.
- bl list grouping: unfiltered groups by status; --status X flattens.
- bl ready parent hint: shown when parent is set, omitted otherwise.

All existing tests must still pass — the visual redesign must not regress the JSON contract or any state transition.

Acceptance:
- cargo tarpaulin reports 100% line coverage on src/display.rs and every consumer file touched.
- CI (if wired) green.
- make hooks precommit passes.
title: Test coverage gate for CLI display overhaul
